/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS:1 &19/X:ADMITS SPECIAL ALLEGATION OF PC 12022,6(B),/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PRES:05-09-07/DISM3/CONTD:FOR SENTENCING/TWS/

/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/STWPX/987,2/ORPJ//CTORD:ORPJ IS GRANTED UNDER THE FOLLOWING TERMS AND CONDITIONS: THE DEFENDANT SHALL NOT TRAVEL OUTSIDE THE BAY AREA COUNTIES WITHOUT NOTICE TO THE DISTRICT ATTORNEY AND APPROVAL OF THE COURT; THE DEFENDANT SHALL NOT WORK ATA JOB WHERE SHE HAS ACCESS TO FUNDS; THE DEFENDANT SHALL SURRENDER ANY PASSPORTS AND NOT APPLY FOR ANY FURTHER PASSPORT; AND THE DEFENDANT SHALL REPORT BY PHONE ONCE A WEEK TO O,R, PROJECT/  CONTD TO BE SET, DOP /CONTD:TO SET/DOP/
